title: SystemSettings
description: Workspace-level configuration — the system variables an organisation sets once. Feature toggles let a deployment turn whole capabilities on or off so the product fits sites that don't need them. One JSON document = one workspace's settings.

features.description: Feature toggles. Each defaults to a conservative value so a new workspace starts lean and opts in to what it needs.

workRequests.description: Whether the Work Request intake queue is enabled. OFF (default): there is no separate request entity — work orders are raised directly, and PM/scheduled work flows straight to a work order as usual. ON: reported demand is captured as a WorkRequest, triaged (submitted → under_review → approved/rejected) and converted into a WorkOrder. Turning it off hides the Requests navigation, dashboard KPI and conversion flow; existing request records are retained, just not surfaced.

rev.description: Optimistic-concurrency revision; bumped on every save.
